since_last: 36% of 86 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +2.31%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 36% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.34% · BTC +2.14% · Gold -0.63% · Nasdaq100 -0.47%. 36% of 86 AI names are green — broad selling. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +2.31%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +2.31%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -3.20%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SMCI is the standout at +13.89%
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -10.80% at $165.02
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -10.80% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
